info.english_meaning: to agitate to be agitatedto shaketo be disturbedto tremble
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kzuBnAti kzoBate kzuByet iti saYcalane kzuBeH ' (Slo. 144) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: atra saYcalanena prakftiviparyAso manTanaM cABiprayate iti vyAKyAtAraH gaRatrayapaWita eza DAtuH sarvatrAkarmakaH
'yadASasA vadato me vicukzuBe' (aTarva 7571) vicalitaM viGawitaM vikftimadvA'BUdityAha
'amBoDayaH SvAsahatA vicukzuBuH' (BA0 pu0 7832) vicukzuBuH=kzoBamupajagmuH viceluH vijahvaluH
